meta.title: Health2U — Your health, organized and understood.
meta.description: Keep all your exams, prescriptions, and health records in one secure place. Get clear insights and share with your doctor easily.

hero.subtitle: Keep all your exams, prescriptions, and health records in one secure place. Get clear insights and share with your doctor easily.

social.tagline: Built for your health, wherever you are

how.heading: How It Works
how.subtitle: Three simple steps to take control of your health records.
how.step1_desc: Add your exams, prescriptions, lab results, and medical records. Take a photo or upload a PDF.
how.step2_desc: We automatically categorize and structure everything. Your records become searchable and easy to find.
how.step3_desc: Get clear insights about your health trends. Share your complete history with any doctor in seconds.

features.heading: Everything you need
features.subheading: One app to manage all your health records, track your progress, and stay on top of your wellbeing.

smart.title: Smart Organization
smart.desc: Upload any document and we'll automatically sort it. Blood tests, imaging, prescriptions — everything in its right place, instantly searchable.

access.title: Access Anywhere
access.desc: Your health records travel with you. Access from any device, share across borders, and always have your history ready for any doctor.

trends.title: Health Trends
trends.desc: See how your health evolves over time. Track patterns in your results and spot changes before they become problems.

share.title: Share with Your Doctor
share.desc: Generate a secure link or PDF of your complete health history. Your doctor gets the full picture in seconds, not scattered papers.

trust.heading: Your data stays yours
trust.body: Your health records are deeply personal. We use industry-leading encryption and comply with the strictest healthcare data standards. You're always in control.
trust.e2e_desc: Only you can access your data

pricing.heading: Simple plans for everyone
pricing.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you're ready. No surprises, no hidden fees.

final_cta.heading: Ready to take control of your health?
final_cta.subtitle: Join thousands of people who already manage their health records with Health2U. It's free to start.
